- World model: - **Blocks**: Orange (2 rows) + blue (3 rows) = 5×5 block, currently at rows 40-44, cols 49-53 (rightmost) - **Movement**: LEFT/RIGHT moves blocks ±5 cols (4 positions: 34-38, 39-43, 44-48, 49-53). UP moves blocks up 5 rows. DOWN only affects timer. - **Corridor**: L-shaped path in charcoal: vertical (cols 29-33, rows 30-39) + horizontal (cols 24-33, rows 40-44) - **White cross**: Stationary at rows 31-33, cols 20-22 - **Goal**: Navigate blocks through the corridor to match/align with the white cross target
- Plan: Move blocks LEFT to corridor entrance, then UP into vertical corridor, then further LEFT/UP toward the white cross. Need to test if blocks can enter the corridor.
- Revise any item above immediately if `current_frame` or `history` contradicts it.
end of world model.

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Looking at the image, the blocks are still at rows 30-34, cols 24-28 (or maybe cols 29-33?). The white cross is still at rows 31-32, cols 21-22. The RIGHT actions didn't seem to move the blocks much.
Let me check the segmentation to see the current block position.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
for node in nodes:
    if node['color'] in ['O', 'b', 'W']:
        print(f"{node['color']} node {node['id']}: pixels={node['pixels']}, boundary={node['boundary']}")

# Blocks at rows 30-34, cols 24-28 (or 29-33?)
# White cross at rows 31-32, cols 21-22
# RIGHT actions seem to only move blocks 5 cols at a time
# From cols 24-28, RIGHT x2 should move to cols 34-38
# But blocks might be at cols 29-33 now
# Let me check if blocks can move further RIGHT
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The blocks are still at rows 30-34, cols 24-28. The RIGHT actions didn't move the blocks! The blocks are stuck at cols 24-28.
Wait, but earlier the blocks moved from cols 19-23 to cols 24-28 after 4 RIGHT actions. Now the blocks are at cols 24-28 and RIGHT doesn't move them.
So the blocks can only move between cols 19-23 and cols 24-28 in this row range. They can't move further RIGHT.
Let me try LEFT to move back to cols 19-23, then UP or DOWN to move to a different row range where RIGHT works.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Blocks at rows 30-34, cols 24-28
# RIGHT doesn't work from here
# Try LEFT to move back to cols 19-23
action(['LEFT'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
